title: Lido Learning International Enterprises is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Lido Learning International Enterprises is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Lido Learning International Enterprises family as a Subject Matter Expert in Indore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Lido Learning International Enterprises:
Lido Learning International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lido Learning International Enterprises!
